goal: Compare Softmax Attention vs Linear Attention in a small Transformer for sequence classification. Build both models from scratch in PyTorch (no HuggingFace). Use IMDb sentiment dataset (2000 train samples, 500 test). Model: 2-layer Transformer encoder with embedding dim 128, 4 heads. Compare: accuracy, training speed, memory usage. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 5 epochs. Report mean ± std, paired t-test, Cohen's d.
